title: Almineez Set of 2 Premium Plastic Drink Bucket - Beverage Tub with Handles - Perfect for Parties, BBQs, Outdoor Events - Cooling Bottles Cans of Beer or Soft Drinks (12L - 12 Litre)
features: Spacious Capacity: With a generous 12/24 Litre capacity, this drink bucket can hold multiple bottles or cans, making it perfect for any event, big or small. Durable Construction: Made from high-quality, BPA-free plastic, this bucket is built to last. Its sturdy design ensures it can withstand the rigours of outdoor use and frequent handling.

Lightweight & Portable: Despite its robust construction, the bucket remains lightweight and easy to carry. The ergonomic handles provide a comfortable grip, making transport a breeze, even when filled with ice and beverages.

Versatile Design: The sleek and simple design fits seamlessly into any setting. Whether it's a backyard BBQ, a pool party, or an elegant event, this drink bucket adds a touch of convenience and style.
Easy to Clean: The smooth plastic surface makes cleaning quick and hassle-free. Simply rinse with water and mild soap after use, and it's ready for your next event.
Multi-Purpose Use: Beyond chilling drinks, this versatile bucket can be used for various purposes, such as storing party favours, toys, gardening tools, and more.
Dimensions :Small 33 x 23 x 14cm and Large 44 x 35 x 20.5cm approx - This comes as set of 2 Ice Drink Bucket - Please note: Random colours will be sent.
description: Product Description Enhance your gatherings with our Premium Plastic Drink Bucket, designed to keep your beverages perfectly chilled and easily accessible. Whether you're hosting a lively party, a family BBQ, or a relaxing outdoor picnic, this large 12 Litre beverage tub is the ideal solution for serving and cooling your drinks. Why Choose Our Premium Plastic Drink Bucket? Perfect for Any Occasion: From casual get-togethers to formal events, this drink bucket is a must-have accessory that combines functionality with style.
